name: omniroute-bridge
description: Dev tooling for the OmniRoute Bridge extension (the extension itself needs no build — load the folder unpacked). NOTE: no "type":"module" — the extension's .js files are browser scripts (CommonJS-style globals); the .mjs tools are ESM by extension.

scripts.test: node test-catalog.mjs && node test-render.mjs && node test-background.mjs && node test-i18n.mjs
scripts.check: node --check background.js && node --check popup.js && node --check providers.js && node --check content-aistudio.js
